name: polish
description: Personal collection of curated, self-made agent skills. The polish plugin includes prompt-polish, which rewrites rough questions into stronger bilingual LLM prompts; file-singlify, which scans disks and folders for duplicate files and directory copies and proposes a read-only single-copy plan; and before-git-push, which runs a final pre-push risk review of the real diff and returns a PUSH or HOLD verdict.
